value.found_quote: Anthropic's Claude models are available through Vertex AI. ... Claude is also available through Amazon Bedrock, Claude Platform on AWS, and Microsoft Foundry.
value.rationale: The page explicitly confirms that Claude models are available on Google Cloud's Vertex AI (a third-party platform), and also mentions Amazon Bedrock and Microsoft Foundry as additional third-party platforms. The page provides detailed documentation on how to deploy and manage Claude models on Vertex AI, including API model IDs, SDK setup, endpoint configuration, and feature support — directly substantiating the claim that Anthropic offers Claude on external third-party platforms.
